experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description: Software Engineer in Corp Eng, managing 1P applications. Extensive work with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services. Responsibilities include developing new features and resolving complex bugs in internal tools.

experiences.title: Software Development Engineer
experiences.description: Engineered an in-place archiving workflow for file connectors, reducing data transfer payload by 90% and cutting overall archiving time by 60%. Redesigned mail export functionality using Aspose.Email, increasing export success rates and improving speed by 160%. Enhanced file metadata retrieval system for JP Morgan project using Java NIO. Revamped OneDrive and SharePoint data ingestion using Microsoft Graph API. Promoted to Team Lead, overseeing three developers.

experiences.title: Software Development Intern
experiences.description: Built a Python-based tool to automate detection of content changes across website versions using BeautifulSoup and difflib. Reduced manual website QA effort by 40%. Created a Jenkins pipeline to automatically run comparison tests on a daily basis.
